subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath come upon the clouds of divine knowledge, verily He is the All-Merciful Who hath testified [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی علی سحاب العرفان انه لهو الرحمن قد شهد
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @Word of God and human limitations, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
